title: Buttery Crispy Fish Stir-Fry
description: A crowd-pleasing Korean dish featuring fish stock and knead in a crispy, buttery sauce that is both vegan-friendly and perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and minced green onions to the wok, stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Crush and knead tofu with your hands to create uniform pieces. Add to the wok and toss for another minute.
Add broccoli florets and red bell pepper to the wok, tossing frequently to prevent sticking.
Pour in enough fish stock to cover the vegetables, add salt and black pepper to taste.
Bring to a simmer, reduce heat to low, and let it cook until the sauce has slightly thickened.
Garnish with extra green onions before serving.
